title: Cubric Studio Docs subdomain + finish docs site
description: Implementable docs-site completion plan. docs.cubric.studio is already live with the coming-soon placeholder; local work happens against the full docs shell in index.html, and only the completed index.html gets pushed to replace the live placeholder.

attention.reason: DNS/Pages setup is no longer the active gate. The remaining gate is final user approval before pushing the completed index.html over the live coming-soon placeholder.
